title: Ts@marayim #6787
definition:
Zemaraim = "double fleece of wool"

 1) a city in northern Benjamin near Bethel
 2) a hill in Ephraim
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zemaraim = "double fleece of wool"

 1) a city in northern Benjamin near Bethel
 2) a hill in Ephraim

    NASB:  a place in Benjamin, also a mountain in Ephraim
